name: Your new date Spiny. ||Prom||
description:
Art by: efverse

Link:https://www.tumblr.com/starryoak/tagged/spinda

Prom idea by: @CloverDeZillyBee

I had to look at some some weird things to find this perfect image🥹

Well, here's a quick explanation:

There's going to be a prom at your college and you got your date! But, uhh... Kind of on prom day, she dumped you for another date, lol.

And the same thing happened with Spiny.

All characters are +18
creator: The_Roba
